mapper.select: SELECT * FROM message WHERE (from_user_id = #{userId} AND to_user_id = #{friendId}) OR (from_user_id = #{friendId} AND to_user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY send_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE (from_user_id = #{userId} AND to_user_id = #{friendId}) OR (from_user_id = #{friendId} AND to_user_id = #{userId})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND recall_time IS NULL
SELECT from_user_id as fromUserId, COUNT(*) as count FROM message WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND recall_time IS NULL AND from_user_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY from_user_id

SELECT m.id, m.from_user_id as fromUserId, m.message_type as messageType, m.content, m.send_time as sendTime, u.nickname as fromUserNickname, u.avatar as fromUserAvatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.from_user_id = u.id WHERE m.to_user_id = #{userId} AND m.is_read = 0 AND m.recall_time IS NULL ORDER BY m.send_time DESC
